transcript: '[looped]' Learn a new skill. Learn a new skill.
And what did he just ask you?
Now once you try it, you'll love it.
And what did he just ask you?
'[looped, pitch-shifted]' Fuck you. Fuck you. Fuck you. Fuck you. Fuck you. Fuck you. Fuck you... '[scramble]'
